faqs.question: What types of cockroaches are common in Fresh Meadows apartments?
faqs.answer: Fresh Meadows properties most commonly experience German cockroaches in kitchens and bathrooms, along with American cockroaches that enter through basements and plumbing areas. Our treatment plans are customized based on the specific species and infestation patterns in your building.
